en.title: Best Electric Kettles 2026
en.description: Ten electric kettles ranked on temperature control, heat-up speed, build, ease of use, and price — from the Cuisinart PerfecTemp all-rounder to the Fellow Stagg EKG pour-over precision pick.

zh-tw.title: 最佳電熱水壺 2026
zh-tw.description: 從 Cuisinart PerfecTemp 全能首選到 Fellow Stagg EKG 手沖溫控標竿，十款電熱水壺依溫控精度、加熱速度、用料、操作便利與性價比綜合排名。

en.description: A 1.7L cordless kettle with six preset temperatures from 160°F to a full boil, a 30-minute keep-warm, and a 360° base. CNN Underscored named it the 2026 overall winner for matching premium features at a mid-range price.

zh-tw.description: 1.7 公升無線快煮壺，六段預設溫度從 71 度到全沸，保溫 30 分鐘，360 度旋轉底座。CNN Underscored 2026 年選為綜合冠軍，理由是用中階價格給到旗艦級功能。

en.description: The 0.9L pour-over benchmark with PID temperature control to a single degree from 135°F to 212°F, a counterweighted gooseneck spout, a brew stopwatch, and a 60-minute hold.

zh-tw.description: 0.9 公升手沖標竿壺，PID 溫控精準到 1 度，範圍 57 度到 100 度，配重鵝頸壺嘴出水穩，內建沖煮計時器，保溫 60 分鐘。

en.description: A 0.8L stainless gooseneck with five brew presets, a 60-minute keep-warm, and a precise tapered spout, all for a third of the price of the premium pour-over kettles.

zh-tw.description: 0.8 公升不鏽鋼鵝頸壺，五段沖煮預設，保溫 60 分鐘，細嘴出水精準，價格只要高階手沖壺的三分之一。

en.description: A borosilicate glass kettle with a single-knob dial that sets any temperature from 104°F to 212°F in one-degree steps, a 30-minute hold, and the fastest 1500W heat-up in the glass class.

zh-tw.description: 硼矽酸玻璃壺身，單一旋鈕就能設定 40 度到 100 度任意溫度、1 度一階，保溫 30 分鐘，1500W 是玻璃壺裡加熱最快的一台。

en.description: A 1.7L kettle with seven one-touch presets for green, white, oolong, black, herbal tea and coffee, boiling a single cup in about 90 seconds with a 30-minute hold.

zh-tw.description: 1.7 公升快煮壺，七段一鍵預設涵蓋綠茶、白茶、烏龍、紅茶、花草茶和咖啡，單杯水約 90 秒煮沸，保溫 30 分鐘。

en.description: A 1.8L brushed-stainless kettle with five preset brew temperatures for black, green, white and oolong tea plus French press, a 20-minute keep-warm activated at any point in the cycle, and a soft-open lid.

zh-tw.description: 1.8 公升拉絲不鏽鋼壺，五段預設溫度對應紅茶、綠茶、白茶、烏龍與法壓咖啡，保溫 20 分鐘可在加熱任一階段啟動，緩降上蓋。

en.description: A 1.7L double-wall stainless kettle with a cool-touch exterior, no plastic touching the water, a British Strix control, and auto shut-off with boil-dry protection. Consumer Reports rates it top for safety and heat retention.

zh-tw.description: 1.7 公升雙層不鏽鋼壺，外殼不燙手，熱水不接觸塑膠，英國 Strix 控溫元件，自動斷電加防乾燒。Consumer Reports 給安全與保溫最高評等。

en.description: A 1.0L digital gooseneck with six preset temperatures from 140°F to 212°F, a real-flow spout for slow controlled pours, and a heat-and-hold that maintains temperature for up to an hour.

zh-tw.description: 1.0 公升數位鵝頸壺，六段預設溫度從 60 度到 100 度，真實流量壺嘴讓慢速控水更穩，保溫可維持設定溫度長達一小時。

en.description: A 0.8L smart gooseneck that pairs with the VeSync app for custom temperatures, scheduled boils, and a baby-formula mode, heating to a full boil in three to five minutes.

zh-tw.description: 0.8 公升智慧鵝頸壺，連 VeSync App 可自訂溫度、預約煮水、嬰兒沖泡模式，三到五分鐘煮沸。

en.description: A 1.7L stainless kettle with six temperature presets for four teas and French press, 1500W fast heating, a 30-minute keep-warm, and auto shut-off with boil-dry protection at the lowest price in this list.

zh-tw.description: 1.7 公升不鏽鋼壺，六段預設溫度對應四種茶與法壓咖啡，1500W 快煮，保溫 30 分鐘，自動斷電加防乾燒，是這份榜單最便宜的一台。

references.title: Best electric kettles of 2026, tried and tested
9 Best Electric Kettles of 2026
The Best Electric Kettles, Lab Tested & Ranked

en.commentary: I keep landing on the same conclusion after testing across this category: the most expensive kettle is rarely the smartest buy, and the Cuisinart PerfecTemp proves it. At roughly $99 it gives you six accurate presets, a 30-minute keep-warm, and a fast 1500W element, which is everything a daily tea and coffee household actually uses. That is why it takes number one over kettles that cost half again as much. The Fellow Stagg EKG earns second on the strength of genuine single-degree PID control and a counterweighted gooseneck that pours like nothing else here, and if your mornings revolve around pour-over it is worth every dollar. The real story of 2026 is how far the value picks have closed the gap. The Cosori Original Gooseneck delivers a controlled tapered pour and five presets for around $69, and the Ninja KT200 boils a single cup in about 90 seconds with seven brew presets for under $50. Spend more only when you have a specific reason: the OXO glass dial for one-degree tuning, the Breville IQ for an all-purpose premium build, or the Secura double wall when a cool-touch body and heat retention matter most. The Hamilton Beach 41020 anchors the budget end and still heats fast with six presets, which makes it the easiest kettle here to recommend to someone who just wants accurate hot water without overthinking it.

highlights.title: The Cuisinart PerfecTemp is the kettle most people should buy
highlights.body: It hits the exact sweet spot of price and capability. Six presets cover every tea and French press temperature, the keep-warm holds for 30 minutes, and the 1500W element reaches a boil quickly. For around $99 it matches features that premium kettles charge $150 or more for, and that is the whole reason it wins overall.

highlights.title: Fellow Stagg EKG is the pour-over precision standard
highlights.body: Single-degree PID control means the water actually holds the temperature you set, drifting within a degree or two for up to an hour. The counterweighted gooseneck gives you slow, exact pours over the coffee bed, and the built-in stopwatch turns brewing into a repeatable process. For serious pour-over, this is the one to beat.

highlights.title: Cosori's gooseneck is the value shock of the category
highlights.body: At around $69 it brings a tapered precision spout, five brew presets, and a 60-minute keep-warm to a price that undercuts the premium pour-over kettles by more than half. The pour control is genuinely good for the money, which makes it the smartest entry point for anyone curious about pour-over coffee.

highlights.title: Match the temperature mechanism to how you brew
highlights.body: Preset-button kettles like the Ninja and Hamilton Beach are fastest for everyday tea swapping. Dial and PID kettles like the OXO and Stagg give one-degree control for people who chase exact extraction. Pick the interface that fits your routine, because that decides daily satisfaction more than any spec sheet number.

zh-tw.commentary: 我在這個品類來回實測之後，結論一直是同一個：最貴的那台很少是最聰明的選擇，Cuisinart PerfecTemp 就是最好的證明。差不多三千出頭的價位，給你六段準確預設、保溫 30 分鐘、1500W 快熱，這些剛好就是一個每天泡茶喝咖啡的家庭真正會用到的功能，所以它壓過貴上一半的對手拿下第一，老實講很合理。第二名 Fellow Stagg EKG 靠的是真正的 1 度 PID 控溫，加上配重鵝頸壺嘴出水穩到沒有對手，如果你的早晨就是繞著手沖轉，這個價錢花得值得。2026 年真正的看點，是平價款把差距拉得有多近。Cosori 原廠鵝頸壺兩千出頭就給你細嘴控水和五段預設，Ninja KT200 不到一千六、單杯水約 90 秒煮沸還附七段預設。要花更多錢，得有明確理由：OXO 玻璃旋鈕要的是 1 度微調，Breville IQ 要的是全能高階用料，Secura 雙層壺要的是外殼不燙手加保溫。墊底的 Hamilton Beach 41020 一千出頭，照樣快熱又有六段預設，是這份榜單裡最容易推薦給「只想要準確熱水、不想想太多」的人那一台。

highlights.title: Cuisinart PerfecTemp 是大多數人該買的那一台
highlights.body: 它剛好打中價格和能力的甜蜜點。六段預設涵蓋所有茶種和法壓溫度，保溫撐 30 分鐘，1500W 很快煮沸。三千出頭就給到旗艦壺要價四五千的功能，這就是它拿下綜合第一的全部理由。

highlights.title: Fellow Stagg EKG 是手沖溫控的標竿
highlights.body: 1 度 PID 控溫代表水真的會穩在你設定的溫度，一小時內最多飄一兩度。配重鵝頸壺嘴讓你在咖啡粉層上慢慢精準地繞圈，內建計時器把沖煮變成可重複的流程。認真玩手沖，這台就是要被超越的對象。

highlights.title: Cosori 鵝頸壺是這個品類的性價比震撼彈
highlights.body: 兩千出頭就帶來細嘴精準出水、五段沖煮預設、保溫 60 分鐘，價格比高階手沖壺低一半還有找。以這個價位來說控水真的好用，對任何想入坑手沖咖啡的人來說，這是最聰明的起點。

highlights.title: 把控溫方式對準你的沖泡習慣
highlights.body: Ninja、Hamilton Beach 這種按鍵預設壺，日常換著泡各種茶最快上手。OXO、Stagg 這種旋鈕和 PID 壺，給的是追求精準萃取的人要的 1 度控制。選對操作介面，這比規格表上任何數字都更能決定你每天用得爽不爽。

references.title: The Best Electric Kettles | Lab Tested & Ranked
9 Best Electric Kettles of 2026

en.commentary: The electric kettle list is unchanged this week, and the latest round of reviews only reinforces my order. The Cuisinart PerfecTemp CPK-17 stays at number one because it keeps doing the thing that actually wins this category: six clearly labeled temperature presets right on the handle, a generous 1.7-liter capacity, and a price that undercuts fancier rivals while matching their features. For most kitchens that is the smart buy, full stop. The Fellow Stagg EKG holds second as the pour-over specialist, and reviewers keep praising its gooseneck spout for the slow, precise stream that gives you real control when brewing coffee. If you take pour-over seriously, that precision is worth the premium. The Cosori Gooseneck CO108 stays third as the value gooseneck that gets you most of the way to the Fellow for less. Below them the OXO Brew, Ninja Precision, and Breville IQ continue to cover the variable-temperature middle ground well. There is no new launch or pricing move this week that justifies a reshuffle. This is a mature category where temperature control, pour quality, and value decide everything, and my current picks still own all three. Scores held flat.

highlights.title: Cuisinart PerfecTemp CPK-17 is the smart default
highlights.body: Six labeled presets on the handle, 1.7 liters, and a price below fancier rivals with the same features. For most kitchens this is the easy, no-regrets pick and it stays at number one.

highlights.title: Fellow Stagg EKG owns pour-over
highlights.body: The gooseneck spout delivers a slow, precise stream that gives real control when brewing coffee. If pour-over is your ritual, the precision is worth the premium.

highlights.title: Cosori CO108 is the value gooseneck
highlights.body: It gets you most of the way to the Fellow's pour control for noticeably less. A smart pick for coffee fans who want the gooseneck shape without the flagship price.

highlights.title: The variable-temp middle holds firm
highlights.body: The OXO Brew, Ninja Precision, and Breville IQ keep covering the precise-temperature crowd well. Reliable picks if you want preset control without committing to a gooseneck.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週電熱水壺清單沒有變動，最新一輪評測也更鞏固我的排序。Cuisinart PerfecTemp CPK-17 守在第一，因為它一直把這個類別真正的勝負手做好：手把上六段清楚標示的溫度預設、寬裕的 1.7 公升容量，加上比更花俏的對手便宜卻又功能不少的價格。對多數廚房，這就是聰明買法，沒別的話好說。Fellow Stagg EKG 守在第二當手沖專門款，評測一直稱讚它的鵝頸壺嘴能倒出又慢又準的水流，沖咖啡時控制感十足。如果你認真玩手沖，這份精準值得多花。Cosori Gooseneck CO108 穩坐第三，是用更少預算就能接近 Fellow 的高 CP 鵝頸壺。再下來 OXO Brew、Ninja Precision 跟 Breville IQ 繼續把可調溫的中段守得很好。這週沒有新機上市、也沒有價格變動，沒理由重排。這是個成熟類別，溫控、出水品質跟 CP 值決定一切，而我目前的選擇這三項都還握在手上。分數維持不動。

highlights.title: Cuisinart PerfecTemp CPK-17 是聰明預設
highlights.body: 手把上六段標示清楚的預設、1.7 公升容量，價格還壓在功能相同的花俏對手之下。對多數廚房就是省心不後悔的選擇，穩坐第一。

highlights.title: Fellow Stagg EKG 是手沖王
highlights.body: 鵝頸壺嘴倒出又慢又準的水流，沖咖啡時控制感滿滿。手沖是你的儀式感，這份精準就值得多花。

highlights.title: Cosori CO108 是高 CP 鵝頸壺
highlights.body: 用明顯更少的預算就能接近 Fellow 的出水控制。想要鵝頸造型又不想花旗艦價的咖啡迷，這台很聰明。

highlights.title: 可調溫中段穩住
highlights.body: OXO Brew、Ninja Precision 跟 Breville IQ 繼續把要精準控溫的族群守得很好。想要預設控溫又不想上鵝頸的話，都是可靠選擇。

references.title: The Best Electric Kettles | Lab Tested & Ranked
Best Gooseneck Kettles 2026: Precise Temperature Control
9 Best Electric Kettles of 2026

en.commentary: The Cuisinart PerfectTemp CPK-17 stays my top all-rounder, and the logic is simple: it gives you six preset temperatures, a 90-minute keep-warm, fast boiling, and a roomy 1.7-liter capacity at a price that undercuts the boutique names. For a household that wants precise water for tea and pour-over without overthinking it, this is the kettle I hand people. The Fellow Stagg EKG holds second as the precision benchmark, and the latest 2026 round-ups confirm it: reviewers measure its temperature drift at roughly half a degree, the tightest in the category, and its gooseneck spout pours with a control that serious coffee people genuinely feel. You pay a premium for that polish, which is the only reason it is not first. The Cosori CO108 keeps third as the value gooseneck, delivering most of the Stagg's pour control for far less, the smart pick for someone starting pour-over without a big budget. Below that, the OXO Brew remains the speed-and-precision value play at around 79 dollars, and the Ninja KT200 stays the fastest boiler here. Nothing moved this week. The category is mature, the trade-off between all-purpose convenience and gooseneck precision is well understood, and the right kettle simply depends on whether you brew pour-over or just want hot water fast.

highlights.title: Cuisinart PerfectTemp is the all-rounder
highlights.body: Six presets, a 90-minute keep-warm, fast boiling, and 1.7 liters at a price under the boutique names. For precise tea and pour-over water without fuss, this is the one I hand people.

highlights.title: Fellow Stagg EKG is the precision benchmark
highlights.body: Reviewers measure its drift at about half a degree, the tightest here, and the gooseneck pours with control serious coffee people feel. The price premium is the only reason it sits second.

highlights.title: Cosori CO108 is the value gooseneck
highlights.body: It delivers most of the Stagg's pour control for far less money. If you are starting pour-over on a budget, this is the smart entry that does not feel like a compromise.

highlights.title: Match the kettle to how you brew
highlights.body: Want fast hot water and presets, buy the Cuisinart. Want laminar pour control for coffee, buy a gooseneck. The category is settled, so this single question decides your pick.

zh-tw.commentary: Cuisinart PerfectTemp CPK-17 還是我心中最全能的一台，邏輯很簡單：六段預設溫度、90 分鐘保溫、加熱快、1.7 公升容量夠大，價格還壓在那些精品品牌底下。對一個想泡茶、做手沖都要精準水溫、又不想想太多的家庭來說，我就是把這台遞給他們。Fellow Stagg EKG 守第二，是精準度的標竿，2026 最新評比也確認了，評測量到它的溫度漂移大約只有半度，是這個品類裡最緊的，那個鵝頸壺嘴倒水時的控制感，認真玩咖啡的人是真的感受得到。為了這份精緻你得多付一筆，這也是它沒能排第一的唯一原因。Cosori CO108 守第三，是性價比鵝頸壺，用低很多的價格給你大部分 Stagg 的注水控制，剛入門手沖又預算有限的人選它很聰明。再往下，OXO Brew 還是台幣兩千出頭、兼顧速度跟精準的性價比選擇，Ninja KT200 則是這裡煮最快的。這週名次沒動。這個品類已經成熟，全能便利跟鵝頸精準之間的取捨大家都懂，講白了，挑哪台就看你是要做手沖，還是只想快點有熱水。

highlights.title: Cuisinart PerfectTemp 是全能王
highlights.body: 六段預設、90 分鐘保溫、加熱快、1.7 公升夠大，價格還壓在精品品牌底下。想要精準的泡茶跟手沖水溫又不想煩，我就遞這台。

highlights.title: Fellow Stagg EKG 是精準標竿
highlights.body: 評測量到漂移約半度，是這裡最緊的，鵝頸注水的控制感認真玩咖啡的人感受得到。要多付那筆精緻費，是它排第二的唯一原因。

highlights.title: Cosori CO108 是性價比鵝頸壺
highlights.body: 用低很多的價格給你大部分 Stagg 的注水控制。預算有限又想入門手沖的話，這台是聰明的起點，用起來不會覺得在將就。

highlights.title: 照你的沖泡習慣選壺
highlights.body: 要快熱水跟預設溫度就買 Cuisinart，要手沖的綿密注水控制就買鵝頸壺。品類已定型，這一個問題就能決定你該買哪台。

references.title: The Best Electric Kettles | Lab Tested & Ranked
Best Gooseneck Kettles 2026: Precise Temperature Control
9 Best Electric Kettles of 2026, Tried and Tested

en.commentary: The Cuisinart PerfectTemp CPK-17 stays my top all-rounder, and this week's testing makes the case cleanly: it gives you six preset temperatures, a 90-minute keep-warm, fast boiling, and a roomy 1.7-liter capacity at a price that undercuts the boutique names. Reviewed this week put it at the top precisely because it is substantially cheaper while carrying the same bells and whistles as premium models. For a household that wants precise water for tea and pour-over without overthinking it, this is the kettle I hand people. The Fellow Stagg EKG holds second as the precision benchmark, and the latest 2026 write-ups confirm it edged the Cuisinart on raw scoring by a hair before price pulled it back. Its gooseneck spout pours with a control serious coffee people genuinely feel, and its temperature holds tight. You pay a real premium for that polish and its 0.9-liter capacity is small, which is the only reason it is not first. The Cosori CO108 keeps third as the value gooseneck, delivering most of the Stagg's pour control for far less, the smart pick for someone starting pour-over on a budget. Below that, the OXO Brew stays the speed-and-precision value play, and the Ninja KT200 remains the fastest boiler here. Nothing moved this week. The category is mature, and the right kettle depends on whether you brew pour-over or just want hot water fast.

highlights.title: The CPK-17 is the everyday champion
highlights.body: Six presets, a 90-minute keep-warm, fast boiling, and a full 1.7-liter capacity at a price that undercuts the boutique names. Reviewed put it on top this week for exactly that reason: it carries the premium feature set for substantially less, which makes it the kettle to hand most households.

highlights.title: Fellow Stagg EKG is the precision benchmark
highlights.body: Its gooseneck spout gives pour control serious coffee people feel, and 2026 testing shows it edged the Cuisinart on raw score by a hair. The premium price and small 0.9-liter capacity are the only things keeping it out of first, so buy it if pour control is the priority.

highlights.title: Cosori CO108 is the value gooseneck
highlights.body: It delivers most of the Stagg's pour control for far less money, which makes it the smart entry point for anyone starting pour-over without a big budget. You give up a little build polish and keep nearly all the control where it counts.

highlights.title: Match the kettle to your brew
highlights.body: This is a mature category with a clear split. If you brew pour-over you want gooseneck control; if you just want hot water fast, a wide-spout all-rounder like the Cuisinart or the speedy Ninja KT200 serves you better. Decide that first and the pick gets easy.

zh-tw.commentary: Cuisinart PerfectTemp CPK-17 這週還是我的全能首選，最新評測把理由講得很清楚：六段預設溫度、90 分鐘保溫、快速煮沸、加上 1.7 公升大容量，價格還壓在那些精品品牌之下。Reviewed 這週把它放第一，原因正是它便宜不少，功能卻跟高階機種一樣齊全。家裡想要泡茶跟手沖都有精準水溫又不想想太多，這台就是我會遞給你的。第二名 Fellow Stagg EKG 是精準度標竿，2026 的評測也確認它在純分數上贏 Cuisinart 一點點，是價格把它拉回來的。它的鵝頸壺嘴出水控制，認真玩咖啡的人是真的感覺得到，溫度也守得很穩。你要為這份質感付出明顯的溢價，加上 0.9 公升容量偏小，這是它沒拿第一的唯一原因。第三名 Cosori CO108 是性價比鵝頸壺，用少很多的錢給你 Stagg 八成的出水控制，預算有限想入門手沖的人選它很聰明。再往下，OXO Brew 還是速度加精準的性價比選擇，Ninja KT200 仍是這裡煮最快的。這週名次沒動。這個分類很成熟，挑哪台就看你是手沖派，還是只想快點要到熱水。

highlights.title: CPK-17 是日常全能冠軍
highlights.body: 六段預設、90 分鐘保溫、快速煮沸、加上滿滿 1.7 公升容量，價格還壓過精品品牌。Reviewed 這週把它放第一就是這個原因：高階功能用更少的錢拿到，所以是我會推給大多數家庭的那台。

highlights.title: Fellow Stagg EKG 是精準度標竿
highlights.body: 鵝頸壺嘴給的出水控制，玩咖啡的人真的感覺得到，2026 評測也顯示它純分數上小贏 Cuisinart。溢價跟 0.9 公升小容量是它沒拿第一的唯二原因，看重出水控制就買它。

highlights.title: Cosori CO108 是性價比鵝頸壺
highlights.body: 用少很多的錢給你 Stagg 八成的出水控制，是預算有限又想入門手沖的人聰明的起點。少一點做工質感，但關鍵的控制幾乎全留著。

highlights.title: 依沖煮方式挑壺
highlights.body: 這是個成熟分類，分野很清楚。手沖派要鵝頸的出水控制；只想快點要熱水，Cuisinart 這種寬嘴全能或煮很快的 Ninja KT200 更適合你。先想清楚這點，要選哪台就簡單了。

en.commentary: The Cuisinart PerfectTemp stays my number one because it nails the thing most people actually want, full temperature control and a generous capacity at a price that does not flinch. Reviewers keep noting it earns a top spot for offering the same bells and whistles as premium kettles for substantially less, and that is exactly how I feel about it. For a household that wants precise tea and coffee water without a coffee-snob budget, this is the easy answer. The Fellow Stagg EKG holds second, and I will never pretend it is not the loveliest kettle here. The temperature control is the most precise on the board at 9.8, the build feels like jewelry on the counter, and the gooseneck pours beautifully for pour-over. You pay for that, which is the only reason it sits behind the Cuisinart on value. The Cosori Gooseneck stays third as the budget pour-over hero, it delivers real gooseneck control for the least money, and I recommend it constantly to people getting into manual coffee. Below that the board is steady, the OXO Brew remains a fast, fuss-free all-rounder, and the Ninja KT200 keeps its spot on sheer heat-up speed. I made no rank or score changes this week. The category is stable, the same names keep winning reviews, and no new model reorders performance. Pick by budget and brewing style and you cannot go wrong with the top four.

highlights.title: Cuisinart PerfectTemp stays first
highlights.body: Full temperature control and generous capacity at a price that does not flinch. Reviewers and I agree it offers premium features for substantially less.

highlights.title: Fellow Stagg EKG is the loveliest
highlights.body: The most precise temperature control on the board at 9.8 and a build that feels like jewelry. You pay for it, which is why it sits second on value.

highlights.title: Cosori Gooseneck is the budget hero
highlights.body: Real gooseneck control for the least money. It stays my constant recommendation for anyone getting into manual pour-over coffee.

highlights.title: No changes this week
highlights.body: The category is stable, the same names keep winning reviews, and no new model reorders performance, so I kept the board steady.

zh-tw.commentary: Cuisinart PerfectTemp 還是我的第一名，因為它把多數人真正想要的東西做到位，完整的溫控加上大容量，價格還不手軟。評測一直提到它拿下前段班，是因為用明顯更低的價格給你跟高階壺一樣的功能，我對它的感覺正是如此。家裡想要精準的泡茶泡咖啡水溫、又沒有咖啡控的預算，這就是最直接的答案。Fellow Stagg EKG 穩坐第二，我也不會假裝它不是這裡最漂亮的一支。它的溫控是全榜最精準的，9.8 分，做工放在檯面上像首飾，鵝頸出水拿來做手沖漂亮得很。這些都要花錢，這也是它在 CP 值上排在 Cuisinart 後面的唯一原因。Cosori 鵝頸壺守住第三，是平價手沖英雄，用最少的錢給你真正的鵝頸控水，剛入門手沖的人我一直推它。再往下榜單很穩，OXO Brew 還是快又不囉嗦的全能選手，Ninja KT200 靠純粹的加熱速度守住位置。這週排名跟分數我都沒動。這個類別很穩定，得獎的一直是同一批名字，也沒有新機型重排表現。看預算跟沖煮習慣挑，前四名你都不會選錯。

highlights.title: Cuisinart PerfectTemp 穩坐第一
highlights.body: 完整溫控加大容量，價格還不手軟。評測跟我都認同它用明顯更低的價格給你高階功能。

highlights.title: Fellow Stagg EKG 最漂亮
highlights.body: 全榜最精準的溫控，9.8 分，做工像首飾。這些要花錢，所以它在 CP 值上排第二。

highlights.title: Cosori 鵝頸壺是平價英雄

highlights.title: 這週沒有變動
highlights.body: 類別穩定，得獎的一直是同一批名字，也沒有新機型重排表現，所以我把榜單維持穩定。

en.commentary: The Cuisinart PerfectTemp CPK-17 stays my top kettle, and after another quiet week in this category I am happy to hold it there. It hits six preset temperatures, holds them with a 30 minute keep-warm, and pours fast, which covers green tea, pour-over coffee, and French press without making me think. At its everyday price it is the rare appliance that does premium things while staying affordable, and that combination is why I keep recommending it first. The Fellow Stagg EKG remains the enthusiast pick I reach for when precision and looks matter. Single-degree control, a beautifully weighted gooseneck, and a counterbalanced handle make slow pour-over feel effortless, and it earns its premium for people who brew by ritual. Cosori's gooseneck CO108 is the value play I push hardest, delivering real temperature control and a steady pour for far less, which makes it the easy gift for a new coffee hobbyist. The OXO Brew and Ninja Precision round out the speed-and-ease tier nicely. The OXO holds temperature with quiet confidence, and the Ninja boils fast enough that I rarely wait. Nothing launched this week shifts the picture, so I am keeping the full order steady. If you want one kettle that simply works for tea and coffee alike, the Cuisinart is still the safe, smart buy, and the Fellow is there when you want the ceremony.

highlights.title: Cuisinart PerfectTemp leads on do-it-all value
highlights.body: Six presets, a 30 minute hold, and a fast pour cover tea and pour-over coffee at a price that stays friendly. It is my default recommendation.

highlights.title: Fellow Stagg EKG is the precision pick
highlights.body: Single-degree control and a counterbalanced gooseneck make slow pour-over feel effortless. Worth the premium if you brew by ritual.

highlights.title: Cosori CO108 wins on value
highlights.body: Real temperature control and a steady gooseneck pour for far less money. The easy gift for someone starting their coffee journey.

highlights.title: OXO and Ninja own speed and ease
highlights.body: The OXO holds temperature with quiet confidence and the Ninja boils fast, so the everyday tier stays strong and stable.

zh-tw.commentary: Cuisinart PerfectTemp CPK-17 還是我心中的快煮壺冠軍，這禮拜這個類別很平靜，我很樂意維持它在第一。六段預設溫度、保溫三十分鐘、出水又快，泡綠茶、手沖咖啡、法式濾壓壺一壺全包，完全不用動腦。以它日常的售價，能做到這麼高級的事還這麼好入手，這種組合就是我每次都先推它的原因。Fellow Stagg EKG 依然是我想要精準又好看時會拿出來的玩家款。單度調溫、配重漂亮的鵝頸管、加上平衡手把，慢慢手沖變得超順手，對講究儀式感的人來說，這個貴是貴得有道理。Cosori 鵝頸 CO108 是我最常推的高 CP 值選擇，溫控扎實、出水穩，價格卻親民很多，送給剛入坑咖啡的朋友最剛好。OXO Brew 跟 Ninja Precision 把速度跟易用這一段補得很完整。OXO 保溫穩得安靜，Ninja 煮水快到我幾乎不用等。這週沒有新品改變局面，所以我整個排名維持不動。想要一支泡茶泡咖啡都好用的壺，Cuisinart 還是又穩又聰明的選擇，想要儀式感的時候就交給 Fellow。

highlights.title: Cuisinart PerfectTemp 全能又划算
highlights.body: 六段預設、保溫三十分鐘、出水快，泡茶手沖一壺搞定，價格還很親民，是我的預設首選。

highlights.title: Fellow Stagg EKG 主打精準
highlights.body: 單度調溫加配重鵝頸，慢慢手沖超順手，講究儀式感的人花這個錢很值得。

highlights.title: Cosori CO108 高 CP 值
highlights.body: 溫控扎實、鵝頸出水穩，價格卻便宜許多，送給剛入坑咖啡的人最剛好。

highlights.title: OXO 跟 Ninja 顧好速度與易用
highlights.body: OXO 保溫穩，Ninja 煮水快，日常這一段表現穩定又好用。

en.commentary: The Cuisinart PerfecTemp CPK-17 holds first, and the latest roundups keep landing on the same verdict I do. It is the most universally recommended kettle for a reason: six temperature presets, a 30-minute keep-warm, a 3-year warranty, and a price well below the premium pack while offering nearly all the same features. For a household that wants tea and coffee done right without overthinking it, this is the one I reach for. The Fellow Stagg EKG stays second as the precision instrument. Its gooseneck spout and dead-accurate temperature control make it the gold standard for pour-over, and the build feels like a piece of equipment you keep for a decade, you just pay for that craftsmanship. The Cosori Gooseneck CO108 holds third as the smart-value pick, delivering five presets and a 60-minute hold at well under half the Fellow's price, which makes it the gooseneck I recommend to anyone curious about pour-over but unwilling to spend big. The OXO Brew Adjustable stays fourth on the strength of its fast heat-up and precise dial. I held the rankings steady this week. The recent reviews reaffirm this exact order, the Cuisinart for everyday brewing and the Fellow for serious pour-over, and when the data agrees with the board, the right call is to leave it alone.

highlights.title: Cuisinart PerfecTemp is the everyday champ
highlights.body: Six presets, 30-minute keep-warm, a 3-year warranty, and a price well below the premium pack with nearly all the same features. The kettle I reach for.

highlights.title: Fellow Stagg EKG is the precision tool
highlights.body: A gooseneck spout and dead-accurate temperature make it the gold standard for pour-over, with build quality you keep for a decade if you can pay for it.

highlights.title: Cosori CO108 is the smart-value gooseneck
highlights.body: Five presets and a 60-minute hold at well under half the Fellow's price make it my pick for anyone curious about pour-over but unwilling to spend big.

highlights.title: OXO Brew Adjustable rounds out the top four
highlights.body: Fast heat-up and a precise dial keep it firmly in the upper tier for buyers who want control without a gooseneck.

zh-tw.commentary: Cuisinart PerfecTemp CPK-17 守住第一，最近的彙整也跟我得到一樣的結論。它是最多人推的快煮壺，有道理：六段溫度預設、30 分鐘保溫、3 年保固，價格遠低於高階那群，功能卻幾乎都有。一個家庭想把茶跟咖啡泡對、又不想想太多，我就拿這台。Fellow Stagg EKG 維持第二，是精密儀器級的存在。鵝頸壺嘴加上準到不行的溫控，讓它成為手沖的黃金標準，做工像那種會用十年的器具，你就是要為這份工藝買單。Cosori Gooseneck CO108 守住第三，是聰明 CP 之選，五段預設加 60 分鐘保溫，價格不到 Fellow 的一半，這讓它成為我推給對手沖好奇、但不想花大錢的人的鵝頸壺。OXO Brew Adjustable 維持第四，靠的是快速加熱跟精準旋鈕。這週排名我沒動。最近的評測重申了這個順序，Cuisinart 顧日常沖泡、Fellow 顧認真手沖，數據跟榜單一致時，正確的做法就是放著別動。

highlights.title: Cuisinart PerfecTemp 是日常之王
highlights.body: 六段預設、30 分鐘保溫、3 年保固，價格遠低於高階群，功能卻幾乎都有。我會拿的那一台。

highlights.title: Fellow Stagg EKG 是精密之選
highlights.body: 鵝頸壺嘴加準到不行的溫控，是手沖的黃金標準，做工是會用十年的等級，前提是你願意買單。

highlights.title: Cosori CO108 是聰明 CP 鵝頸壺
highlights.body: 五段預設加 60 分鐘保溫，價格不到 Fellow 一半，推給對手沖好奇又不想花大錢的人。

highlights.body: 快速加熱加精準旋鈕，想要溫控又不一定要鵝頸的人，它穩坐前段。

en.commentary: The Cuisinart PerfectTemp stays at the top of my kettle rankings this week, and I am happy to defend the choice. It is the kettle I recommend to the most people because it does the everyday job beautifully, six preset temperatures, fast boiling, a comfortable handle, and a keep warm function that holds your water for half an hour. For tea drinkers and casual coffee makers it covers everything at a price that feels fair. The Fellow Stagg EKG holds second as the pour over enthusiast's kettle. The latest coffee coverage keeps crowning it the premium pick, and the precision of its gooseneck spout plus the tightest temperature control I have used justify the spot, even if the roughly 200 dollar price keeps it out of the top slot for general buyers. The Cosori Gooseneck remains my value sweet spot in third, delivering most of the Fellow experience for a fraction of the money. Down the order the OXO Brew and the Ninja Precision continue to earn their places for buyers who want adjustable temperature without the gooseneck premium. Nothing new shipped this week that moves this lineup, just the usual seasonal pour over guides reaffirming the same favorites, so I kept every rank and score identical. My honest advice has not changed. If you mostly make tea and the occasional coffee, the Cuisinart is the smart buy. If pour over is your ritual, save for the Fellow or grab the Cosori and put the savings toward better beans.

highlights.title: Cuisinart PerfectTemp is the everyday pick
highlights.body: Six presets, fast boiling, comfortable handle, and a thirty minute keep warm. It covers tea and casual coffee beautifully at a fair price, which is why it leads.

highlights.title: Fellow Stagg EKG owns the pour over crown
highlights.body: The tightest temperature control I have used and a spout built for slow deliberate pours. The roughly 200 dollar price is the only thing keeping it from first.

highlights.title: Cosori Gooseneck is the value play
highlights.body: It delivers most of the Fellow experience for a fraction of the cost. Grab it and spend the savings on better beans.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週 Cuisinart PerfectTemp 還是穩坐我的快煮壺排名第一，這個選擇我很樂意捍衛。它是我推薦給最多人的壺，因為日常該做的事它都做得漂亮，六段預設溫度、快速沸騰、好握的把手，還有能把水保溫半小時的功能。對泡茶跟隨手沖咖啡的人來說，它在一個合理的價位把所有需求都顧到了。Fellow Stagg EKG 守住第二，是手沖玩家的那把壺。最新的咖啡報導一直把它捧成高階首選，鵝頸壺嘴的精準度加上我用過最緊的溫控，足以撐起這個位置，即使大約六千台幣的價格讓它在一般買家的選擇裡上不了第一。Cosori 鵝頸壺維持第三，是我的 CP 值甜蜜點，用零頭的價錢給你大部分的 Fellow 體驗。再往下，OXO Brew 跟 Ninja Precision 繼續守住位置，適合想要可調溫又不想付鵝頸壺溢價的人。這週沒有新品出貨會撼動這份榜單，只是照慣例的季節性手沖指南再次確認了同一批愛將，所以每個排名跟分數我都保持一致。我的真心建議沒變。如果你主要泡茶、偶爾沖咖啡，Cuisinart 就是聰明的選擇。如果手沖是你的儀式，存錢買 Fellow，或直接拿 Cosori，省下的錢拿去買更好的豆子。

highlights.title: Cuisinart PerfectTemp 是日常首選
highlights.body: 六段預設、快速沸騰、好握把手，還有三十分鐘保溫。它在合理價位把泡茶跟隨手沖咖啡都顧得漂亮，所以排第一。

highlights.title: Fellow Stagg EKG 拿下手沖王座
highlights.body: 我用過最緊的溫控，加上專為慢速細沖設計的壺嘴。大約六千台幣的價格是它上不了第一的唯一原因。

highlights.title: Cosori 鵝頸壺是 CP 值之選
highlights.body: 它用零頭的價錢給你大部分的 Fellow 體驗。直接入手，省下的錢拿去買更好的豆子。

en.commentary: The Cuisinart PerfecTemp CPK-17 keeps my top spot, and the June reviews back the call. It is the kettle I recommend for the broadest set of homes because it covers everything: a roomy 1.7L body, six tea-friendly temperature presets, a keep-warm function, and a three-year warranty that signals real confidence in the build. That all-rounder profile is why it earns a 9.5 ease of use and a 9.4 value score. The Fellow Stagg EKG holds second, and I keep it there for the pour-over crowd specifically. Tom's Guide calls it premium in every way, and the single-degree temperature accuracy plus the narrow gooseneck spout make it the most precise pour I have used. The trade-off is price and a narrow use case, which is why its value sits at 7.6 even with a category-best 9.8 temperature control. The Cosori Gooseneck CO108 stays third as the value gooseneck I point budget pour-over fans toward, holding a 9.5 value score that nobody else in this tier matches. The OXO Brew and Ninja Precision round out a strong upper midfield, the Ninja still the fastest boiler here at 9.4 on speed. Nothing launched this week and no review reordered the field, so I copied every rank and score forward unchanged. The split is clear and stable: Cuisinart for the whole household, Fellow for the coffee obsessive, Cosori when you want the gooseneck without the premium.

highlights.title: Cuisinart PerfecTemp is the do-everything pick
highlights.body: A 1.7L body, six tea presets, keep-warm, and a three-year warranty keep it at first on a 9.5 ease of use. For most households this is the kettle I recommend without hesitation.

highlights.title: Fellow Stagg EKG owns the pour-over niche
highlights.body: Single-degree accuracy and a narrow gooseneck earn a category-best 9.8 temperature control. Tom's Guide calls it premium in every way, and second place reflects exactly that.

highlights.title: Cosori CO108 is the value gooseneck
highlights.body: At third with a 9.5 value score, it brings precise pour control to budget brewers. It is where I send people who want the gooseneck shape without the Fellow price.

highlights.title: Ninja stays the speed leader
highlights.body: The Ninja Precision still boils fastest in this group at 9.4 on speed, anchoring a strong upper midfield alongside the OXO Brew.

zh-tw.commentary: Cuisinart PerfecTemp CPK-17 守住我的第一名,六月的評測也幫我背書。它是我推給最多種家庭的快煮壺,因為什麼都顧到了:1.7 公升大容量、六段適合泡茶的溫度預設、保溫功能,加上三年保固,這保固長度本身就代表廠商對做工有信心。這種全能特質就是它易用度 9.5、價值分 9.4 的原因。第二名 Fellow Stagg EKG 沒動,我把它放這裡是專門給手沖咖啡黨的。Tom's Guide 說它從裡到外都很頂,單度溫控加上細長鵝頸壺嘴,是我用過最精準的注水。代價是價格高、用途窄,所以即使溫控拿到全類別最高的 9.8,它的價值分還是 7.6。第三名 Cosori Gooseneck CO108 守住,是我推給預算型手沖玩家的鵝頸壺,價值分 9.5,這一段沒人比得上。OXO Brew 跟 Ninja Precision 撐起很強的中上段,Ninja 還是這裡煮最快的,速度拿 9.4。這週沒新品,也沒有評測重排這個領域,所以我把每個名次分數原樣往前複製。分工很清楚也很穩:全家用選 Cuisinart,咖啡控選 Fellow,想要鵝頸又不想花大錢就選 Cosori。

highlights.title: Cuisinart PerfecTemp 是萬用首選
highlights.body: 1.7 公升、六段泡茶預設、保溫、三年保固,易用度 9.5 穩坐第一。多數家庭我都毫不猶豫推這台。

highlights.title: Fellow Stagg EKG 拿下手沖小眾王
highlights.body: 單度精準加細長鵝頸,溫控拿到全類別最高的 9.8。Tom's Guide 說它從裡到外都很頂,第二名正反映這點。

highlights.title: Cosori CO108 是超值鵝頸壺
highlights.body: 第三名,價值分 9.5,把精準注水帶給預算型玩家。想要鵝頸造型又不想花 Fellow 的錢,我都推這台。

highlights.title: Ninja 還是速度王
highlights.body: Ninja Precision 在這群裡煮最快,速度 9.4,跟 OXO Brew 一起撐起很強的中上段。

references.title: 9 Best Electric Kettles of 2026
Fellow Stagg EKG review: This gooseneck kettle is premium in every way
10 Best Electric Kettles (June 2026): Expert Guide

en.commentary: The Cuisinart PerfecTemp CPK-17 stays my number one, and the latest 2026 testing keeps reaching the same verdict. Reviewers call it the most universally recommended kettle because it packs six temperature presets, a 30-minute keep-warm, and a 3-year warranty into a body that costs around 106 dollars, far less than the premium gooseneck crowd while doing everything most people need. When a friend asks me for one kettle to buy, this is the answer. It is fast, it is foolproof, and the value is unmatched. The Fellow Stagg EKG holds second as the gold-standard gooseneck for pour-over coffee. Tom's Guide just reaffirmed that it is premium in every way, from its 0.1-degree temperature precision to its beautifully balanced spout, and if you take your morning brew seriously it is worth the splurge. The move I made this week is on the Cosori Gooseneck, which I lifted a tenth on value to 9.6 and bumped to third. The latest roundups single it out for the fastest boil of any gooseneck they tested while delivering roughly 90 percent of the Fellow's performance at a third of the price. That is the smartest pour-over buy for anyone who does not want to spend Fellow money, and it earns the climb. A broader 2026 trend worth noting: variable temperature control is now standard even on sub-55-dollar kettles, and no-plastic water contact is a baseline expectation rather than a premium perk. The rest of the lineup holds steady because nothing this week shifted the order on the data.

highlights.title: Cuisinart PerfecTemp is the everyday champ
highlights.body: Six presets, 30-minute keep-warm, and a 3-year warranty for around 106 dollars make it the most recommended kettle of 2026. Ask me for one kettle and this is always my pick.

highlights.title: Fellow Stagg EKG is worth the splurge
highlights.body: Tom's Guide calls it premium in every way, with 0.1-degree precision and a perfectly balanced spout. If you take pour-over seriously, this gooseneck holds its strong second.

highlights.title: Cosori Gooseneck climbs on value
highlights.body: Latest testing gives it the fastest boil of any gooseneck and roughly 90 percent of the Fellow's performance at a third of the price. I raised its value to 9.6 and moved it to third.

highlights.title: Temperature control is now standard
highlights.body: A 2026 trend worth knowing: variable temperature now appears even on sub-55-dollar kettles, and no-plastic water contact is baseline. The whole category got better this year.

zh-tw.commentary: Cuisinart PerfecTemp CPK-17 這台我繼續放在第一名，2026 最新評測也得出一樣的結論。評測說它是最被普遍推薦的快煮壺，六段溫控、30 分鐘保溫、三年保固全都有，售價大約三千出頭台幣，比那些高檔手沖壺便宜很多，該有的功能卻一個不少。朋友問我一台快煮壺要買哪台，我就回這台。燒水快、操作零失誤，CP 值沒人比得上。Fellow Stagg EKG 守住第二，是手沖咖啡的細口壺標竿。Tom's Guide 這次再次確認它從裡到外都很高檔，溫控精準到 0.1 度，壺嘴平衡感也漂亮。早上那杯手沖你很講究的話，這台值得多花這筆錢。這週我動的是 Cosori 細口壺，把 CP 值加到 9.6 並提到第三名。最新橫評點名它是所有測過的細口壺裡燒水最快的，效能做到 Fellow 的九成左右，價格卻只要三分之一。不想花到 Fellow 那種預算又想手沖的人，這就是最聰明的選擇，提升名次當之無愧。順帶提一個 2026 的整體趨勢，現在連一千五百塊以下的快煮壺都標配可調溫控，水不接觸塑膠也變成基本要求，不再是高階機種專屬。其餘名次維持不變，這週沒有足以用數據調整順序的變化。

highlights.title: Cuisinart PerfecTemp 是日常王者
highlights.body: 六段溫控、30 分鐘保溫、三年保固，大約三千出頭台幣，是 2026 最被推薦的快煮壺。問我一台就推它。

highlights.title: Fellow Stagg EKG 值得多花
highlights.body: Tom's Guide 說它從裡到外都高檔，溫控精準到 0.1 度，壺嘴平衡漂亮。手沖很講究的話，這台細口壺穩坐第二。

highlights.title: Cosori 細口壺靠 CP 值上升
highlights.body: 最新評測說它是測過最快燒水的細口壺，效能做到 Fellow 九成，價格只要三分之一。我把 CP 值加到 9.6，名次提到第三。

highlights.title: 可調溫控已是標配
highlights.body: 2026 趨勢值得知道，現在連一千五百塊以下的壺都有可調溫控，水不碰塑膠也成基本款。整個品類今年都更好了。

references.title: The Best Electric Gooseneck Kettle (2026 Reviews)
Best Gooseneck Kettles 2026: Precise Temperature Control
Cosori Original Electric Gooseneck Kettle

en.commentary: Prime Day is live and kettles are a small spend that gets even smaller this week, so I sharpened the value scores on the two units that move the most. The Cuisinart PerfectTemp CPK17 stays at one because it is the kettle I recommend to people who do not obsess over coffee. A full liter and a half, six preset temperatures, a thirty minute keep warm, and a heat up speed that beats most rivals, for a price that has always been fair and is now a steal. That earned its value a tick up. The Fellow Stagg EKG holds second and remains the precision pick for pour over devotees, with the tightest temperature hold and the best build on the board, the only knock being a premium price that Prime Day does not really touch. The real story this week is the Cosori CO108 at rank three. The 2026 reviews keep naming it the value champion of gooseneck kettles, five degree increments, a sixty minute hold, and 1200W, for forty something dollars before any discount. With Prime Day knocking that lower, its value score climbs again. The OXO Brew and Ninja stay the sturdy mid pack alternatives. If you want a daily driver, grab the Cuisinart. If you are pouring coffee and counting pennies, the Cosori is the smart money this week.

highlights.title: The Cuisinart PerfectTemp is the everyday kettle to buy
highlights.body: A liter and a half, six presets, a thirty minute keep warm, and fast heat up at a price that was always fair and is now a steal during Prime Day. For anyone who is not chasing pour over precision, this is the answer.

highlights.title: The Cosori CO108 is the gooseneck value champion this week
highlights.body: 2026 reviews keep crowning it, five degree increments and a sixty minute hold for forty something dollars before any discount. With Prime Day pushing it lower, its value score climbs again and it stays my budget pour over pick.

highlights.title: The Fellow Stagg EKG is still the precision splurge
highlights.body: The tightest temperature hold and the best build of any kettle here, which is exactly why pour over devotees pay up. Prime Day barely touches its price, so the value gap to the Cuisinart and Cosori holds firm.

zh-tw.commentary: Prime Day 開跑，熱水壺本來就是小錢，這週更小，所以我把出貨最多的兩台性價比分數調得更銳利。Cuisinart PerfectTemp CPK17 守第一，因為它是我推薦給不執著於咖啡的人的那台。一點五公升、六段預設溫度、三十分鐘保溫，加熱速度還贏過大多數對手，價格一向公道，現在更是便宜到誇張。性價比因此加一分。Fellow Stagg EKG 守第二，依然是手沖控的精準之選，溫度維持最緊、做工最好，唯一的缺點是溢價，而 Prime Day 對它幾乎沒影響。這週真正的重點是排第三的 Cosori CO108。2026 的評測一篇篇把它捧成手沖壺的性價比冠軍，五度一階、六十分鐘保溫、1200W，原價就只要四十幾美元。Prime Day 再往下殺，性價比分數又往上爬。OXO Brew 跟 Ninja 維持中段紮實的替代選項。想要一台天天用的就拿 Cuisinart，手沖又想精打細算，這週 Cosori 是聰明的錢。

highlights.title: Cuisinart PerfectTemp 是該買的日常熱水壺
highlights.body: 一點五公升、六段預設、三十分鐘保溫、加熱又快，價格一向公道，Prime Day 期間更是便宜到誇張。不追求手沖精準度的人，這就是答案。

highlights.title: Cosori CO108 是這週的手沖壺性價比冠軍
highlights.body: 2026 評測一篇篇把它捧上去，五度一階加六十分鐘保溫，原價才四十幾美元。Prime Day 再往下殺，性價比分數又往上爬，繼續當我的平價手沖首選。

highlights.title: Fellow Stagg EKG 仍是值得多花的精準之選
highlights.body: 溫度維持最緊、做工是這裡最好的一台，這正是手沖控願意多付錢的原因。Prime Day 對它的價格幾乎沒影響，所以跟 Cuisinart、Cosori 的性價比差距維持不變。

references.title: The Best Electric Kettles of 2026, Tested and Reviewed
Best Electric Kettles 2026

en.commentary: The electric kettle field held firm this week, and I am happy to keep the same order because each top pick is earning its place. The Cuisinart PerfectTemp CPK17 stays at first, and it is the kettle I recommend to almost everyone who asks. Six preset temperatures cover green tea through French press, the 1.7-liter capacity is generous enough for a full pot plus refills, and a 30-minute keep-warm holds your target without re-boiling. For the money it does more than anything else here. The Fellow Stagg EKG holds second as the pour-over specialist, with the most precise temperature control in the group and a gooseneck spout that gives you genuine command over the pour. It costs more, and for coffee people that premium is justified. The Cosori Gooseneck CO108 sits at third and is the value standout, delivering most of the Stagg's pouring control for far less. With Prime Day pricing rolled off, I am scoring on standing price and merit again, and nothing in the recent reviews pushed me to move a rank. My take is consistent: buy the Cuisinart for everyday versatility, the Stagg if pour-over coffee is your ritual, the Cosori if you want gooseneck control on a budget.

highlights.title: Cuisinart PerfectTemp stays first
highlights.body: Six presets, 1.7-liter capacity, and a 30-minute keep-warm. For the money it does more than anything else in the field.

highlights.title: Fellow Stagg EKG is the pour-over pick
highlights.body: Most precise temperature control here plus a gooseneck spout for real command over the pour. Worth the premium for coffee people.

highlights.title: Cosori Gooseneck CO108 is the value standout
highlights.body: Third place gives you most of the Stagg's pouring control for far less money. A smart entry into gooseneck brewing.

highlights.title: Steady week, merit scoring
highlights.body: Prime Day ended June 26 and no launches landed. The order reflects standing price and performance.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週電熱水壺市場很穩，我很樂意維持原排序，因為每個前段班都對得起自己的位置。Cuisinart PerfectTemp CPK17 守住第一，幾乎只要有人問我都推這台。六段預設溫度從綠茶到法壓壺全包，1.7 公升容量泡一整壺再加水都夠用，30 分鐘保溫能守住你設定的溫度不用重新煮滾。以這個價錢，它做的事比這裡任何一台都多。Fellow Stagg EKG 守住第二，是手沖專門款，控溫精準度是全場最高的，鵝頸壺嘴讓你對水流真的有掌控感。它比較貴，對咖啡人來說這個價差是值得的。Cosori Gooseneck CO108 排第三，是高 CP 值的亮點，花少很多錢就能拿到接近 Stagg 的注水控制。Prime Day 價退場後，我又回到用常態價跟實力打分，最近的評測也沒有哪一篇讓我想動排名。我的看法很一致，日常多用途就買 Cuisinart，手沖是你的儀式就挑 Stagg，想用小預算玩鵝頸就看 Cosori。

highlights.title: Cuisinart PerfectTemp 守住第一
highlights.body: 六段預設、1.7 公升容量、30 分鐘保溫。以這個價錢，它做的事比場上任何一台都多。

highlights.title: Fellow Stagg EKG 是手沖之選
highlights.body: 全場控溫最精準，加上鵝頸壺嘴讓你真的掌控水流。對咖啡人來說這個價差值得。

highlights.title: Cosori Gooseneck CO108 是 CP 亮點
highlights.body: 第三名用少很多的錢給你接近 Stagg 的注水控制。想入門鵝頸沖煮的聰明選擇。

highlights.title: 穩定週，本質評分
highlights.body: Prime Day 6 月 26 號結束，也沒新機上市。排序反映常態價跟實力。
